commit_scope: Compose the proven-in-isolation fkwu native lane into a living native PRESENCE: a minimal cross-platform host that just is, observes, and hot-loads recipes minted or shared by siblings WHILE RUNNING, no restart. Adds a parametric x64 affine lowering (an arbitrary recipe(n)=a*n+b, not three hand-encoded constants), the four-way-proven presence decision brain (pick-up diff, consent, authenticity), the long-running thin loader, and a live end-to-end Windows proof of all three rungs.
evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/form-pe-coff-affine.fk -> aff-code a b lowers recipe(n)=a*n+b to x64 lea+ret for a in {1,2,3,5,9}; reproduces form-pe-coff's mul3-add7/mul5-add1/add42 byte-for-byte and lowers unseen specs (9n+0, 2n+100)

Git Bash + Windows toolchain: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/form-pe-coff.fk form-stdlib/form-pe-coff-affine.fk form-stdlib/tests/form-pe-coff-affine-band.fk -> 127; fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way; 1 ok, 0 divergent

Git Bash + Windows toolchain: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/cell-sync.fk form-stdlib/presence-loop.fk form-stdlib/tests/presence-loop-band.fk -> 1023; fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way; 1 ok, 0 divergent

form/native/presence/form_presence_host.c -> long-running cross-platform loader: Windows LoadLibraryA/GetProcAddress and POSIX dlopen/dlsym; watches <dir>/queue/*.job, calls the i64->i64 recipe, records out.log, keeps handles resident, rests on <dir>/stop

powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/presence_cycle.ps1 -> status pass; gcc=C:/TDM-GCC-64/bin/gcc.exe, lld-link=C:/Program Files/LLVM/bin/lld-link.exe, loader=LoadLibraryA/GetProcAddress
Rung 1 (be): presence alpha out.log = one event=awake (tick=0), event=heartbeat (tick=8) while idle
Rung 2 (mint->native live): alpha hot-loaded mintA 3n+7 arg=5 -> result=22, then mintB 5n+1 arg=10 -> result=51, same PID, single awake; native == oracle pl-affine-eval (22, 51)

Rung 3 (ask a sibling): consent decision pl-can-answer? "addr-1n42" -> 1 and authenticity pl-accept? -> 1 evaluated on the Go kernel at runtime; beta hot-loaded the answered recipe 1n+42 arg=9 -> result=51 == oracle; beta single awake, PID stable, no restart
presence out.log shows exactly one event=awake per process across all hot-loads -> the entry executable never restarts

ci_validation.notes: PR CI has not run yet for this branch.

deploy_validation.notes: Local native runtime feature; live mac/android presence proofs require those hosts and reuse the already-proven recipe-dylib (macOS) and kernel-on-android (.so) lowering lanes.

phase_gate.reason: Local four-way bands and the live Windows end-to-end passed; CI, deploy, and live mac/android presence receipts remain pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A new long-running native presence binary observes and hot-loads recipes minted or shared by siblings while running, never restarting the entry executable. Recipe lowering becomes parametric over the affine family rather than three hand-encoded constants. The pick-up/consent/authenticity policy is four-way proven Form, consulted by the live cycle at runtime.
public_endpoints: local-only: Form stdlib recipes, a native presence C host, and a PowerShell live-cycle proof; no public HTTP endpoint changed
test_flows: Lowering proof: form-pe-coff-affine band -> 127 four-way (Go/Rust/TypeScript/fkwu, 0 divergent), reproducing the three shipped recipes byte-for-byte and lowering unseen affine specs.

Brain proof: presence-loop band -> 1023 four-way, covering pick-up diff, consent-gated answer (positive and two negatives), authenticity accept (positive and negative), live integration, and the affine oracle pinning 22/51/51.
Live Rung 1: a presence process wakes once and heartbeats while idle (a place to just be).

Live Rung 2: two recipes minted mid-run are lowered by the Go kernel walking pe-affine-recipe-object, hot-loaded by the live presence, and called -- 3n+7(5)=22, 5n+1(10)=51 -- at a stable PID with a single awake event (no restart).

Live Rung 3: a sibling lacking a recipe is answered after the holder's consent and the arrival's authenticity are decided by the four-way brain on the kernel at runtime; the asker integrates and computes 1n+42(9)=51 live, PID stable.
Cross-check: every live native result equals the four-way-proven oracle pl-affine-eval.
